User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system.

role.description: Role of the user (Employer, University, Student, Admin).

Certificate.title: Certificate
Certificate.description: Represents a certificate uploaded to the system.

uploadDate.description: Date and time when the certificate was uploaded.

verificationResult.description: The result of the certificate verification.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information. Each document is keyed by the user's unique ID.

/users/{userId}/certificates/{certificat.description: Stores certificate information for each user.

/roles_admin/{userId}.description: Collection to store admin user roles. Existence of a document with the user's ID grants admin privileges.

/roles_university/{userId}.description: Collection to store university user roles. Existence of a document with the user's ID grants university privileges.

/roles_employer/{userId}.description: Collection to store employer user roles. Existence of a document with the user's ID grants employer privileges.
